description_long: This is a compact, two-door coupe car with a sleek, aerodynamic body finished in white. The front features pop-up headlights, a low hood with a subtle central vent, and a blacked-out windshield and side mirrors. The side profile reveals a gently sloping roofline, flush door handles, and black trim running along the lower edge of the doors. The rear is characterized by a wide, dark-tinted rear window, integrated taillights, and a subtle rear spoiler. The wheels are solid and dark, matching the car's understated, sporty aesthetic. The overall design suggests a late 1980s to early 1990s Japanese sports coupe, likely a Mazda RX-7 FC, known for its rotary engine and lightweight construction.
description: A sleek, white two-door coupe with pop-up headlights, black trim, and a gently sloping roofline, reminiscent of a late 1980s Japanese sports car.
description_view_0: Front view shows pop-up headlights, a low hood with a central vent, and black side mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the coupe's two doors, sloping roofline, and black trim along the lower body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a wide, dark rear window, integrated taillights, and a subtle rear spoiler.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the coupe's streamlined profile and flush door handles.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
